zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu於大約1090年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特時，他的父親Weinemar de GAND21歲，母親Gisèle de GUÎNES14歲。他和Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen至少有4個女兒。他去世於1127年10月24日在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫阿爾斯特享年38歲，埋葬在比利時布拉班特阿福利格姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu于大约1090年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特时，他的父亲Weinemar de GAND21岁，母亲Gisèle de GUÎNES14岁。他和Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen至少有4个女儿。他去世于1127年10月24日在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫阿爾斯特享年38岁，埋葬在比利时布拉班特阿福利格姆。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and French: nickname from Old French gent, Middle English gent(e) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Ghent .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with gand ‘spell’, such as Gandolf.

variants.name: Jent
meanings: English: variant of   Gent  .

variants.name: Ghent
meanings: English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Gent .

variants.name: Gentes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Henri, Lucien, Marcel, Normand.
French (Gentès): probably a nickname derived from Old French gent ‘high born, noble’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Gent  .

variants.name: Genther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Otto.
German:
variant of   Gent  .

variants.name: Genthe
meanings: German: variant of Gente (see Gent ), or a habitational name from Gentha in Saxony-Anhalt, east of Wittenberg.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu was born about 1090, in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Weinemar de GAND, was 21 and his mother, Gisèle de GUÎNES, was 14. He had at least 4 daughters with Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. He died on 24 October 1127, in Aalst, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 38, and was buried in Affligem, Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu est né environ 1090, à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Weinemar de GAND, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de GUÎNES, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 filles avec Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1127, à Aalst, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Affligem, Brabant, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu um 1090 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Weinemar de GAND 21 und seine Mutter Gisèle de GUÎNES 14. Er hatte mit Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1127 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Aalst, Ostflandern, Belgien und wurde in Affligem, Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu è nato il circa 1090 nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Weinemar de GAND, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Gisèle de GUÎNES, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie con Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Morì il 24 ottobre 1127, nel Aalst, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Affligem, Brabante, Belgio.

ja.Abdij van Affligem (Belgique): ベルギーブラバントアフリジェム

ja.Flandre, Belgique: ベルギーvラアンデレン
ja.Aalst (Belgique): ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンアールスト
ja.Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandi: フランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンモータグネ-アウ-ペルチェ
ja.lifeSummary: Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbuが約1090年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた時，父Weinemar de GANDは21歳，母Gisèle de GUÎNESは14歳であった。彼はLiutgarde Berthout van Grimbergenとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1127年10月24日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンアールストで38歳で死去し，ベルギーブラバントアフリジェムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu(이)가 대략 1090년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Weinemar de GAND(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisèle de GUÎNES(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1127년 10월 24일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 알스트에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 아플리그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Weinemar de GAND, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de GUÎNES, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1127, em Aalst, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Affligem, Brabante, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu родился около 1090 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Weinemar de GAND было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de GUÎNES, 14. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Он умер 24 октября 1127 г. в местности аалст, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности аффлигем, брабант, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu nació aproximadamente 1090, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Weinemar de GAND, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Gisèle de GUÎNES, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1127, en Aalst, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Affligem, Brabante, Bélgica.
